response.justification: Bogdan brings a strong software engineering foundation spanning 20+ years, Staff-level tenure, and directly relevant MCP server and agentic workflow infrastructure experience at re:cinq. However, the resume falls short of the role's core requirements: Python is absent from the skills list, there is no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines, and the stated AI work is vague and appears recent rather than representing 8+ years of production AI delivery. The customer-facing technical leadership expected at this level is not demonstrated. The role demands a GenAI specialist who has shipped production AI systems end-to-end; this resume reads more like a strong generalist who has recently touched agentic tooling.
strengths: Direct MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow framework experience at re:cinq is a precise match to the job's listed key technologies
Long Staff-level engineering career with polyglot depth, strong DevOps/CI/CD culture, and consistent technical leadership roles
AWS CDK experience and prior high-throughput data pipeline work (Sociomantic, millions of requests/sec) shows cloud and data infrastructure fundamentals
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list, yet it is the primary language called out in both required qualifications and key technologies
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or observability frameworks — the technical core of the production GenAI delivery this role requires

Customer-facing technical discovery and enterprise stakeholder leadership are not evidenced; the resume is inward-facing (open source, internal tooling, workshops) rather than forward-deployed consulting
